channel.title: command-line on KHTDR.com
channel.description: Recent content in command-line on KHTDR.com

item.title: pageboy
item.description: The full source code and examples are available at: https://github.com/khtdr/pageboy pageboy Write your shell scripts in any combination of scripting languages. Example Script example.pb #!/usr/bin/env pageboy echo in Bash $PAGE php echo back to Bash #!/usr/bin/env php <?php echo "in PHP\n"; chmod +x ./example.pb ./example.pb produces the output: in Bash in PHP back to Bash tests ./run-tests.sh pageboy-v2.1.3 ./pageboy-test # runs as pageboy script ./pageboy-test -r <page> # runs requested page .

item.title: Opts.js
item.description: You can find the source code and all examples at Github, github.com/khtdr/opts. Introduction to Opts.js Why choose opts.js over something bigger and better? Small : Under 10kb, uncompressed. Stable : Relatively unchanged since 2010. See changelog. Standalone : No package manager necessary, no compiling needed. See src/opts.js. Tested : Over 5 million downloads. See npm/opts. Quick-Start example The following example set up a custom "version" function, and opts in to the automatic help message.
